query: Create a new LikeC4 architecture model for an e-commerce platform with context and container views.
expected_behavior: Reads DSL guidance from references/likec4-dsl-quickstart.md before creating a model from scratch
Creates or updates LikeC4 model files (.c4 or .likec4)
Includes at least context and container views
Runs or reports npx likec4 validate
Returns npx likec4 start preview command
